arts.ttl: Celtic vs Slovan Bratislava: Preview, predictions and lineup
arts.sum: Celtic begin their 2024/25 Champions League campaign in Glasgow on Wednesday night as they welcome competition novices Slovan Bratislava to Celtic Park. The Slovakian champions bypassed Struga, Celje, APOEL, and Midtjylland to qualify for the league phase and were the only team to enter the draw having started their journey from the first qualifying round back in mid-July.

arts.ttl: Celtic's Champions League masterplan laid bare as Chelsea and Man City drafted in for ultimate preparation
arts.sum: The Scottish champions have high hopes for the European campaign

arts.ttl: The famous mantra that Celtic MUST apply in Champions League as insider hears Brendan Rodgers loud and clear
arts.sum: The Hoops boss wowed fans with the fly on the wall footage of his team talk at Parkhead last season

arts.ttl: Peter Grant admits one ‘concern’ after Celtic handed 'perfect' Champions League draw
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers and his Celtic team will embark on another Champions League journey on Wednesday. “I know Brendan (Rodgers) and his players, the way they have gone about their business on the pitch, no matter who they have played, their attitude against the ball, that tells you enough about a good side that they are willing to work their socks off.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton thinks Celtic have a 'real opportunity' after being handed an 'enormous' Champions League advantage
arts.sum: “But anyway, if you look at Celtic’s draw, you think blimey, there’s a real opportunity for them to pick up a fair few points, Bratislava at home, Brugges at home, Young Boys at home. But if you were to hand-pick a team to play for Celtic in the first game, it would be Bratislava at home.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart thinks Brendan Rodgers could throw Celtic selection curveball in Champions League
arts.sum: However, that hasn’t stopped Michael Stewart from claiming that despite how good Kuhn (and Daizen Maeda) has been, there is a player at Celtic who is the best winger at the club. But despite Rodgers having the likes of Luis Palma, Maeda and Kuhn, Stewart believes that Forrest is still the best winger at Celtic.

arts.ttl: What Celtic stars REALLY think of Champions League revamp as Paulo Bernardo has message for big guns
arts.sum: Man City star Rodri was among the stars who complained about the intense schedule at the top end of the game

arts.ttl: Slovan Bratislava know the 2 things they must do to stop Celtic in 'best atmosphere in the world'
arts.sum: Vladimir Weiss brings his troops to Glasgow's east end for the Champions League opener under the lights at Parkhead

arts.ttl: Celtic boss Rodgers seeking to change the record in Europe as Champions League strikes up a fresh tune
arts.sum: Ten years ago this week, Brendan Rodgers managed in the group stages of the Champions League for the first time.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton does the Celtic maths to silence Champions League cynics before resisting 'gimme' temptation
arts.sum: The Parkhead hero was in high spirits before the Hoops face Slovan Bratislava
